name_cn:
Premium quality, high version
DIOR❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Black Small]
This Dior Toujours handbag made its debut at the Fall/Winter 2023 show, featuring a unique, casual, and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized woven quilting stitching. The spacious interior compartment includes a small pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-knob closure and adjustable sides to enhance its elegance. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy hand-carry.
 CD Lock and strap closure
 Dior charm
 Removable inner pocket
 Adjustable leather handle
 Includes dust bag
Model: 2822
Dimensions: 23x15x15cm
